Not revenue; expense label, so not appropriate.

Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Purchase of goods and services' from the full preview as the closest direct cost / cost of sales line. However, the income statement also shows service-heavy cost structure (e.g., large Personnel costs), so COGS classification may require manual confirmation.

Typical overhead bucket and populated.

Balance sheet liability, not period SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Per rule, because an explicit 'Selling, General & Admin' row exists but appears mostly empty in preview, included it along with closest overhead buckets for coverage. Excluded totals and excluded depreciation/amortization rows.

candidates.why: Most direct R&D/development expense label.

R&D-related amortization, but should be excluded from XRD if a direct R&D expense line exists.
